notes: The game works fine out of the box in Proton. Only the main character is white, no textures.
title: Chronicles of Mystery: The Scorpio Ritual

notes: On Proton it works out of the box with WineD3D. The bug with the white main character is fixed in Proton 4.11. If you use PROTON_USE_D9VK=1 %command% as a launch option (available since Proton 4.11) the game starts with D9VK (D3D9 to Vulkan translation), but it will freeze as soon as you launch a new game. Tested with the new Mesa ACO compiler on Plasma Wayland.
title: Chronicles of Mystery: The Scorpio Ritual
